column1: Say "please do exactly as the manual says" (use とおり).
column3: まにゅあるのとおりにしてください。
column4: マニュアルのとおりにしてください。
column5: Noun + のとおりに: follow exactly as written

column1: Say "things went as planned" (use とおり).
column3: けいかくどおりにすすんだ。
column5: どおり attaches to nouns: exactly as planned

column1: Say "he did exactly as I told him" (use とおり).

column5: V-た + とおりに: as one said/did

column1: Say "the results were exactly as predicted" (use とおり).

column1: Say "please proceed as directed" (use とおり).
